titleStmt.title: SII 36.31: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 31. (A.R. No. 31 of 1910.) MELAṬŪR (Milaṭūr), PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the Vighnēśvara shrine in the courtyard of the Unnatapurīśvara temple.

summary.p: An undertaking executed by two shepherds of the local village, to Cīkāryam and Cīmāyēcurak-kaṇkāṇi, the two temple authorities of the Tiruvagattīcuramuḍaiyār temple at Peru Milaṭṭūr in Kiḻāṟ-kūṟṟam, a subdivision of Nittavinōdha-vaḷanāḍu, for the annual supply of eight nāḻis of ghee probably for maintaining one perpetual lamp, after receiving eight sheep from the temple. The inscription ends with an unidentified symbol.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ [śrī Irā]cātirāca tevaṟku yāṇṭu mūnṟāvatu makara nā[yaṟṟu pakuḷapakṣat]tu tirayotaciyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mūlattināṉ ḷa nittavinota vaḷanāṭṭu kiḻāṟ kūṟṟattu perumilaṭṭūr Uṭaiyār tiruvakattī curamuṭaiyār koyilil cikārya
ñ ceyvārkaḷukkum cimāyecurakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum Ivvūrirukkum maṉṟāṭikaḷil cirāḷanampiyum cirāḷanpakuvāyanum Ivviruvom ya tīṭṭukkuṭuttapa Innāyanārka Onṟukku milaṭṭūruṭaiyān veḷān Uṭaiyanāyakan cāvāmūvāp perāṭāka Eṅkaḷ vacam viṭṭa cemmalippayirāṭu Eṭṭu Ivvā
ṭu Eṭṭuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Āṭṭu Eṇṇāḻi ney Eṅkaḷil � tava Aḷantu taravukoḷḷak kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu ttīṭṭuk kuṭuttom Iccirāḷaṉnampiyum cirāḷanpakuvāyanum Ivviruvom Itu cirāḷanampi cayiñcaiyātaṉamaikku Ivvūr Ūrk kaṇa(k)kku tirukka
ṇṇapuramuṭaiyāṉ tevarvallavaṉṉeḻuttu Itu cirāḷaṉpakuvāyaṉ cayiñ caiyātanamaikku koyiṟkaṇakku Iṟaiyāṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eṇ tirunāmamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven milaṭṭūruṭaiyān cūlapāṇi comatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven milaṭṭūruṭaiyān tillaiviṭaṅkat tiruvaraṅ
kamuṭaiyāṉ EḻuttuUnidentified symbol.
Digital edition of SII 36.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
